subtitle: Review scope edges, actors, and done criteria before downstream stories or requirements.

sections.title: Goals at a Glance
sections.label: Goals
sections.why: Lead with the intended outcomes under approval.

sections.title: Non-Goals / Scope Exclusions
sections.label: Boundary
sections.why: Make scope edges explicit before approval.

sections.title: Personas / Actors that Matter
sections.label: Actors
sections.why: Show who receives value or constrains scope.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State the exact yes/no calls tied to this charter.

sections.title: Scope Risks and Open Questions
sections.label: Open Issues
sections.why: Keep risky or unresolved framing visible before downstream work.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie approval claims to exact charter evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval validation status.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what later artifacts may now treat as settled.

glance_cards.label: Actors
glance_cards.hint: People or roles shaping downstream work.

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact charter quotes.
